title: Classic Atomizer
body:
# Description
Replacing Netherite Sword on Atomizer from Team Fortress 2


![.](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/WandererEdges/Modrinth/main/nFESfBi.png)

"Classic Atomizer" requires either Entity Model Features (Fabric) or OptiFine (Forge) to be installed alongside it.

## Names for anvil

```
Blu Atomizer
Red Atomizer
```

## Authors/Авторы
- Model/Модель - Jorik_Smith
